'''rayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weedily|weedily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weedily|weedily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rayate|rayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rayatesher|rayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayatesherĂ«m|rayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rayatero|rayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rayateshĂ«|rayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayateshĂ«m|rayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirayatero|gokirayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirayateshĂ«|gokirayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayateshĂ«m|gokirayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorayankerom|gorayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorayankeshĂ«|gorayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayankeshĂ«m|gorayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorayankeya|gorayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rayaterom|rayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayatemu|rayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rayateya|rayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirayaterom|gokirayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayatemu|gokirayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirayateya|gokirayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rayayate|rayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rayayatesher|rayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayayatesherĂ«m|rayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rayayatero|rayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rayayateshĂ«|rayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayayateshĂ«m|rayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirayayatero|gokirayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirayayateshĂ«|gokirayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayayateshĂ«m|gokirayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorayayankerom|gorayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorayayankeshĂ«|gorayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorayayankeshĂ«m|gorayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorayayankeya|gorayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rayayaterom|rayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rayayatemu|rayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rayayateya|rayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirayayaterom|gokirayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirayayatemu|gokirayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirayayateya|gokirayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠte|rĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠtesher|rĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠtero|rĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠtero|gokirĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠterom|rĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠtemu|rĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠyĂŠteya|rĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠterom|gokirĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠyĂŠteya|gokirĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafyafte|rafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafyaftesher|rafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafyaftesherĂ«m|rafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafyaftero|rafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafyafteshĂ«|rafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafyafteshĂ«m|rafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafyaftero|gokirafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafyafteshĂ«|gokirafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafyafteshĂ«m|gokirafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafyafnkerom|gorafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafyafnkeshĂ«|gorafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafyafnkeshĂ«m|gorafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafyafnkeya|gorafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafyafterom|rafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafyaftemu|rafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafyafteya|rafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafyafterom|gokirafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafyaftemu|gokirafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafyafteya|gokirafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
